description: Updates a Resource Planning Tag for the given company

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Response schema for a single Tag.

group_ids.description: Array of UUIDs representing Groups this Tag is assigned to. Can be empty if `globally_accessible` is true.

globally_accessible.description: Indicates if the Tag is globally available to all current and future Groups.

abbreviation.description: A 5-character max abbreviation for the Tag.

require_expr_date.description: Indicates whether an expiration date is required when applying the Tag to a Person.

expr_days_warning.description: Number of days before expiration when the Tag enters "warning" mode. Only applicable if `require_expr_date` is true.

color.description: Hexadecimal color code for the Tag.

categories.description: Array of Tag Categories the Tag belongs to. Can be empty if not categorized.

schema.description: Request body schema for updating a Tag.

company_id.description: Unique identifier for the company. NOTE - this is a Laborchart company ID.

abbreviation.description: A 5-character max String representing the abbreviation that will appear in most Tag views. Defaults to the first 5 characters of the name if not provided.

categories.description: Array of Tag Categories this Tag should be available to, if Tag Categories are enabled.

color.description: Hexadecimal color code for the Tag, used for categorization and visual distinction.

expr_days_warning.description: Number of days before expiration when the Tag should be in "warning" mode. Only relevant if `require_expr_date` is true.

globally_accessible.description: Controls whether the Tag should be globally available to all current and future Groups.

group_ids.description: Array of UUIDs for which Groups this Tag should be available to or be removed from depending on context. For adding availability, if `globally_accessible` is true, this can be an empty array.

require_expr_date.description: Controls whether the Tag should require an expiration date when applied to a Person.
